zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry  Morgard Femour Richards於1486年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾明斯特 洛弗爾時，他的父親Laurence Richards40歲，母親Elizabeth Wenman26歲。他於1502年與Margaret Fermour在英國諾福爾可盧加姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在英國諾福爾可被列為knight。他去世於1512年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可盧加姆享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry  Morgard Femour Richards于1486年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾明斯特 洛弗爾时，他的父亲Laurence Richards40岁，母亲Elizabeth Wenman26岁。他于1502年与Margaret Fermour在英国諾福爾可盧加姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在英国諾福爾可被列为knight。他去世于1512年在英国英格兰諾福爾可盧加姆享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richards
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Richard , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Rickards .
German: patronymic from the personal name   Richard  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: Morgard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German   Morgret   or   Marquardt  . The name is found mainly in PA.

variants.name: Morgret
meanings: German (Lower Saxony): variant of Margret, a habitational name from any of the places called Margareth(en), which in turn are named with the female saint's name Margaretha, see Margaret .
Americanized form of German   Marquardt  . Compare   Morgart  .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry  Morgard Femour Richards was born in 1486, in Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Laurence Richards, was 40 and his mother, Elizabeth Wenman, was 26. He married Margaret Fermour in 1502, in Rougham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as knight in Norfolk, England. He died in 1512, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry  Morgard Femour Richards est né en 1486, à Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Laurence Richards, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Wenman, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Fermour en 1502, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est knight à Norfolk, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1512, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 26 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry  Morgard Femour Richards è nato il nel 1486 nel Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Laurence Richards, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Wenman, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Fermour nel 1502, nel Rougham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come knight nel Norfolk, England. Morì nel 1512, nel Rougham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry  Morgard Femour Richardsが1486年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアミンスター ロベルで生まれた時，父Laurence Richardsは40歳，母Elizabeth Wenmanは26歳であった。1502年にイギリスノーフォルクロウアムでMargaret Fermourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。イギリスノーフォルクでの職業はknightと記録されている。彼は1512年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアムで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry  Morgard Femour Richards(이)가 1486년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 민스터 러벨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Laurence Richards(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Wenman(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1502년 영국 노르폴크 루그함에서 Margaret Fermour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 노르폴크에서 knight이었다. 그는 1512년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 루그함에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry  Morgard Femour Richards родился в 1486 г. в местности минстир лавелл, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Laurence Richards было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Wenman, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Fermour в 1502 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии knight в местности норфолк, Англия. Он умер в 1512 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry  Morgard Femour Richards nació en 1486, en Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Laurence Richards, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Wenman, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret Fermour en 1502, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era knight en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Murió en 1512, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 26 años.
